summary: Iteration 44 - Onboarding Wizard and Streak Calculation Fixes. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: 1) Trade streak API counts consecutive trading days regardless of profit/loss, 2) Countdown timer refactored to read from localStorage each tick, 3) restartCountdown function can recreate check-in data from signal if localStorage is missing, 4) OnboardingWizard component properly integrated in ProfitTrackerPage, 5) Backend POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding endpoint exists and accepts onboarding data, 6) Backend GET /api/profit/onboarding-status endpoint returns user's onboarding status, 7) OnboardingWizard NOT shown for existing users with deposits (correct behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: Streak calculation (server.py lines 1338-1399): Correctly counts consecutive trading days regardless of profit/loss. Uses date comparison and skips weekends (Saturday=5, Sunday=6).
Countdown timer (TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 663-738): Refactored to read target time from localStorage each tick instead of using closure variable. Uses 500ms interval for more frequent updates.
restartCountdown (TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 755-845): Can recreate check-in data from signal if localStorage is missing but isTrading is true. Shows toast 'Countdown restored from signal'.
OnboardingWizard (OnboardingWizard.jsx): 5-step wizard for experienced traders (user type, start date, balance, transactions, trade profits). Saves progress to localStorage.
complete-onboarding endpoint (server.py lines 4652-4797): Creates deposits, withdrawals, and trade logs from onboarding data. Updates user's onboarding_completed status.
onboarding-status endpoint (server.py lines 4799-4808): Returns user's onboarding status including has_deposits and has_trades flags.
OnboardingWizard integration (ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 1770-1780): Properly integrated with isOpen, onClose, onComplete, and isReset props.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported issues have been addressed: 1) Timer stalling issue - countdown now reads from localStorage each tick instead of using closure, with 500ms interval for more frequent updates. 2) Streak calculation - now counts consecutive trading days regardless of profit/loss, skipping weekends. 3) Onboarding wizard - comprehensive 5-step wizard for new/experienced traders, saves progress to localStorage, backend endpoints for complete-onboarding and onboarding-status. The OnboardingWizard only shows for new users without deposits - existing users like master admin won't see it.

trade_streak_api.details: GET /api/trade/streak returns correct structure with streak, streak_type, total_trades. Streak counts consecutive trading days regardless of profit/loss.

countdown_timer_localstorage.details: TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 663-738: updateCountdown function reads from localStorage each tick, uses 500ms interval, handles localStorage being cleared.

restart_countdown_signal_recovery.details: TradeMonitorPage.jsx lines 755-845: restartCountdown checks localStorage, if missing but isTrading && signal, recreates check-in data and saves to localStorage.

onboarding_wizard_component.details: OnboardingWizard.jsx: Step 1 shows 'I'm New to Merin' and 'I'm Experienced' cards. Saves progress to localStorage. handleSaveForLater allows continuing later.

complete_onboarding_endpoint.details: POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding accepts user_type, starting_balance, start_date, transactions, trade_entries. Creates deposits and trade logs.

onboarding_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/profit/onboarding-status returns onboarding_completed, trading_type, trading_start_date, has_deposits, has_trades.

onboarding_wizard_not_shown_for_existing.details: OnboardingWizard NOT shown for master admin who already has deposits. Only shows for new users or after reset.

api_tests.GET /api/trade/streak: PASS - Returns streak count and type
api_tests.POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding: PASS - Endpoint exists and validates input
api_tests.GET /api/trade/active-signal: PASS - Returns active signal (MOIL10 BUY at 06:26)
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns account value and profit data

ui_tests.trade_monitor_page_load: PASS - Shows Active Signal, LOT Size, Trade Control, Time countdown, Trade History, streak indicator
ui_tests.profit_tracker_page_load: PASS - Shows Account Value, Total Deposits, Total Profit, LOT Size, Projection Vision
ui_tests.onboarding_wizard_hidden: PASS - Not shown for existing user with deposits
ui_tests.missed_trade_popup: PASS - Shows correctly with signal details (MOIL10 BUY at 06:26)

streak_calculation.notes: Counts consecutive trading days regardless of profit/loss. Skips weekends (Saturday=5, Sunday=6). Uses date comparison.

countdown_timer.notes: Reads from localStorage each tick. Uses 500ms interval. Handles localStorage being cleared.

restart_countdown.notes: Can recreate check-in data from signal if localStorage is missing. Shows toast 'Countdown restored from signal'.

onboarding_wizard.notes: 5-step wizard for experienced traders. Saves progress to localStorage. handleSaveForLater allows continuing later.

complete_onboarding_endpoint.notes: Creates deposits, withdrawals, and trade logs from onboarding data. Updates user's onboarding_completed status.

onboarding_status_endpoint.notes: Returns onboarding_completed, trading_type, trading_start_date, has_deposits, has_trades.

onboarding_wizard_integration.notes: Properly integrated with isOpen, onClose, onComplete, and isReset props.
